quest.story.chapter.cure.desc_1: The cure seemingly only §otreats§r the infection. It does nothing to prevent it.
quest.story.chapter.cure.desc_2: What remains in the ruined hospitals and polyclinics dwindles day by day.
quest.story.chapter.cure.desc_3: Without a means to make more, eventually, some day, it will run out.
quest.story.chapter.cure.desc_4: And if it does, the last hope of restoring civilization dies with it.
quest.story.chapter.cure.desc_5: Perhaps you've learned of this truth through hard-fought survival.
quest.story.chapter.cure.desc_6: Perhaps you simply wish to change the course of fate.
quest.story.chapter.cure.desc_7: §oAll you need is to rediscover the cure's method of manufacture.§r
quest.story.chapter.cure.subtitle: There has to be more, right?
quest.story.chapter.cure.title: Seeking the Cure
quest.story.chapter.tutorial.0348341AE70: Skill books provide a fixed amount of experience towards the skill, with higher tiers providing more experience.
They can be found in &eTier 2&r districts and onwards.
&o&7Be sure to check the loot tables for each building in the &6Districts&r &7chapter, once you have discovered them!&r&r

quest.story.chapter.tutorial.33D70F7A152: The &bBattery Upgrade&r allows your backpack to be charged in a &bCharger&r to store RF.
The stored RF can then be used to power other equipment like &bPortable Grids&r, which are an alternative to backpacks.
&7More information on Portable Grids and Refined Storage can be found in the &6Refined Storage &7chapter.
quest.story.chapter.tutorial.447F8964C48: &bStack Upgrades&r allow your backpack to store larger stacks of items, exceeding the normal 64 item limit.
The tier of stack upgrade acts as a &bmultiplier&r to the base stack size.
&cNOTE:&r Multiple tiers of stack upgrades can be combined for even larger stacks!

They can be found in &eTier 2&r districts and onwards.
&o&7Be sure to check the loot tables for each building in the &6Districts&r &7chapter, once you have discovered them!&r&r

quest.story.chapter.tutorial.5A2CC575FC3: Use potatoes and cabbages to craft &bcabbage rolls&r in the stove.
Eating a wide variety of food will increase your maximum health, as well as provide other benefits, a list of which can be found in the &6Survival&r chapter.
&7A list of other cooking recipes can be found by typing &6#eaten &7into JEI.&r
quest.story.chapter.tutorial.6F39379B6C8: The &bFeeding Upgrade&r allows you to automatically consume food from your backpack, saving your hotbar slots.
&cWARNING:&r The feeding upgrade will attempt to consume any food item starting from the top left inventory slot of the backpack, regardless of what it is!
quest.story.chapter.tutorial.desc_1: This modpack is split into &l&66&r districts, each with increasing difficulty and more extreme temperatures.
quest.story.chapter.tutorial.desc_2: Your starting district is the &eSuburb Residential&r district, which is relatively peaceful.
quest.story.chapter.tutorial.desc_3: &7As you visit new buildings in the district, they will be shown in their respective &6District Chapter&7.&r
quest.story.chapter.tutorial.desc_4: You can browse to the relevant &6District Chapter&r by clicking the &bbook icon&r beside the district quest in this chapter, or by clicking on the &blinked quest icon&r on the upper left of the respective quest.&r
quest.story.chapter.tutorial.desc_5: &cWe recommend gearing up in your starting district before trying to move onwards.&r
quest.story.chapter.tutorial.subtitle: Welcome to DeceasedCraft!
quest.story.chapter.tutorial.subtitle.de: If you've just started a new world, you will have §bone day§r of relative safety where no zombies will spawn.
Use it to familiarize yourself with the guidebook!
§cWARNING:§r While world generation will try to place you in the &eSuburb Residential District§r, §cthe district may still be too small to sucessfully survive in§r.
If that is the case, you may want to consider re-generating a new world.
quest.story.chapter.tutorial.title: The First Days
